| `slt` | `rd, rs1, rs2` | $rd \leftarrow (rs1 < rs2) \,?\, 1 : 0 \quad (\mathbb{Z})$ | set less than | R |
| `sltu` | `rd, rs1, rs2` | $rd \leftarrow (rs1 < rs2) \,?\, 1 : 0 \quad (\mathbb{N})$ | set less than unsigned | R |
| `slti` | `rd, rs1, imm12` | $rd \leftarrow (rs1 < SignExt(imm12)) \,?\, 1 : 0 \quad (\mathbb{Z})$ | set less than immediate | I |
| `sltiu` | `rd, rs1, imm12` | $rd \leftarrow (rs1 < SignExt(imm12)) \,?\, 1 : 0 \quad (\mathbb{N})$ | set less than immediate unsigned | I |
